page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 8 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Storage is bundled as a local 1919 GB SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average multi-core CPU performance, with stress-ng multi-core and Passmark CPU scores falling in the middle 50% tier. However, single-core performance is weak, as shown by stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core scores in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth is average, reaching 328.53 GB/sec for cached small blocks and around 39.23 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Redis SET operations perform at an average level of 6.06 million operations per second, while static web serving throughput and software compilation are weak.

Given the high local SSD capacity and the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this server offers resource density suitable for storage-heavy and database workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation and bundled storage provide predictable local I/O performance, though the older processor architecture presents a tradeoff in single-threaded compute efficiency. It is best suited for relational databases, NoSQL databases, caching layers like Redis, and general-purpose workloads requiring significant local storage and moderate memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.2xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz, 64.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 1919 GB local SSD. It operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show average multi-core CPU capabilities and memory bandwidth, though single-core performance and software compilation speeds are weak. The server excels in memory and storage density, delivering 8.0 GB of RAM per core alongside substantial local SSD capacity. This hardware profile makes the ecs.i2.2xlarge qualitatively cost-effective for I/O-sensitive applications that do not require cutting-edge single-threaded compute. It is well-suited for database hosting, Redis caching layers, and storage-intensive general-purpose workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.2xlarge is an x86_64 server with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and a bundled 1919 GB local SSD, optimized for database and storage-intensive workloads.

tagline: An x86 server featuring dedicated Intel cores, balanced memory density, and a high-capacity bundled local SSD for storage-heavy workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
Bundled 1919 GB local SSD storage for high-capacity local I/O
Average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
